name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival 🆕 New Season Artist Collaboration Series Handbag. Collaborating with Japanese bamboo artist Hafu Matsumoto to present 4 bag styles. The new work uses flexible calfskin to simulate the natural form of bamboo, shaping a three-dimensional silhouette through weaving and knotting techniques. The Zen-inspired design features a Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetic.
